cit.basis: Flat 16% corporate income tax (impozit pe profit) on taxable profit under the Fiscal Code (Law 227/2015), administered by ANAF.

micro_enterprise_regime.note: Micro-enterprise regime: 1% (or 3%) tax on TURNOVER for companies with revenue up to EUR 250,000 in 2025 (threshold drops to EUR 100,000 from 2026). Different tax base (turnover, not profit) — out of scope for this profit-based estimator.

minimum_turnover_tax.note: IMCA: minimum turnover tax of 1% applies to large companies with turnover above EUR 50 million; acts as a floor on the 16% profit tax. Out of scope for this profit-based estimator.

cit.pillar_two_note: Romania has implemented the EU Pillar Two directive (15% global minimum tax) via Law 431/2023 for large groups (consolidated revenue >= EUR 750m); out of scope for this SME estimator.

dividend_tax.note: Dividend withholding tax raised from 8% to 10% for dividends distributed from 1 January 2025.

vat.note: TVA standard rate is 19% in H1-2025; RAISED to 21% from 1 August 2025 under the 2025 fiscal reform package (reduced rates consolidated to 11% from that date). This params file uses the 19% rate in force at the start of the 2025 range; apply rate_from_2025_08_01 for supplies on or after 1 August 2025. Romania participates in the EU One Stop Shop (OSS).

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ. Note the mid-year VAT change on 2025-08-01.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Micro-enterprise regime, IMCA minimum turnover tax, Pillar Two, sector-specific rules, relief, and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official ANAF guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
